description: Fall — Yahweh speaks; Adam taken from ground; Yahweh drives out
mustContain: Now the serpent was more subtle than any animal of the field which Yahweh God had made. He said to the woman
Yahweh God called to the man, and said to him, “Where are you?”
So He drove out the man; and He placed cherubim
mustNotContain: Yahweh God called to the man, and said to Him, “Where are you?”
So he drove out the man; and he placed cherubim
